F(x)=∫axf(t)dtF(x)=\int_a^x f(t) d tF(x)=∫ax​f(t)dt

F(x+Δx)=∫ax+Δxf(t)dt=∫axf(t)dt+∫xx+Δxf(t)dt=F(x)+∫xx+Δxf(t)dt\begin{aligned} F(x+\Delta x) & =\int_a^{x+\Delta x} f(t) d t \\ & =\int_a^x f(t) d t+\int_x^{x+\Delta x} f(t) d t \\ & =F(x)+\int_x^{x+\Delta x} f(t) d t \end{aligned}F(x+Δx)​=∫ax+Δx​f(t)dt=∫ax​f(t)dt+∫xx+Δx​f(t)dt=F(x)+∫xx+Δx​f(t)dt​

children.value: 平均値の定理を使って、

children.html: ∫xx+Δxf(t)dt=(x+Δx−x)f(x+θΔx)=Δx⋅f(x+θΔx)(0<θ<1)\begin{aligned} \int_x^{x+\Delta x} f(t) d t & =(x+\Delta x-x) f(x+\theta \Delta x) \\ & =\Delta x \cdot f(x+\theta \Delta x) \quad(0<\theta<1) \end{aligned}∫xx+Δx​f(t)dt​=(x+Δx−x)f(x+θΔx)=Δx⋅f(x+θΔx)(0<θ<1)​

children.value: なので、上の2つの式から

children.html: F(x+Δx)−F(x)Δx=f(x+θΔx)(0<θ<1)\frac{F(x+\Delta x)-F(x)}{\Delta x}=f(x+\theta \Delta x) \quad(0<\theta<1)ΔxF(x+Δx)−F(x)​=f(x+θΔx)(0<θ<1)

f(x+θΔx)→f(x)f(x+\theta \Delta x) \to f(x)f(x+θΔx)→f(x)
Δx→0\Delta x \to 0Δx→0
F′(x)F'(x)F′(x)
F′(x)=f(x)F'(x) = f(x)F′(x)=f(x)

children.value: （fundamental theorem of differential and integral calculus）という。
